---
name: New tutorial request
about: Propose a new CS/AI/data science topic for a tutorial
title: "[Tutorial] "
labels: new-tutorial
---

**Topic**
What concept should this tutorial cover?

**Domain**
Which existing domain folder does this fit under (or should a new one be added)?

**Why it matters**
Why is this a useful thing to have an in-depth tutorial on?

**Rough outline (optional)**
- Theory:
- Visuals:
- Implementation:
- Use cases:

**Are you willing to write it?**
Yes / No / Could help review
